scripts.seed:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma db seed --schema=prisma/schema.production.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -e .env.production -- prisma migrate deploy --schema=prisma/schema.production.prisma
scripts.db:reset:prod: echo 'Use setup wizard option 11 for safe production reset'
scripts.db:generate:fallback: echo 'ERD generation failed (missing Chrome/Chromium), continuing without ERD...' && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.production.prisma || echo 'Prisma client generated successfully without ERD'
scripts.db:generate:with-erd: cp prisma/schema.development.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate && echo 'ERD generated successfully at ERD.svg'
scripts.db:install-chrome: echo 'To enable ERD generation, install Chrome/Chromium: sudo apt install chromium-browser (Ubuntu) or download Chrome manually, then run: npm run db:generate:with-erd'
scripts.prod:deploy: npm run build:prod && npm run pm2:restart
scripts.prod:full-deploy: npm run db:migrate:prod && npm run build:prod && npm run pm2:restart
